html:
Exclusive to:  

The Battle Spear is a melee Weapon in the Reign of Giants DLC exclusive to Wigfrid. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her Inventory, along with the Battle Helm. The Battle Spear requires 2 Twigs, 2 Flint, and 2 Gold Nugget to craft and is available to craft at the beginning of the game. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the Spear in the early game.

Tips

  • Spawning with a decent weapon allows easy hunting in early game.

Trivia

  • Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the game.
  • Battle Spear was Character-Specific Item, but its change in Don't Starve Mega Update.

Gallery

  • Battle Spear Equipped

“It feels very stabby.”
–Wilson
“I prefer a flame, but to each her own.”
–Willow
“Is a good weapon.”
–Wolfgang
“It seems a tad dramatic.”
–Wendy
“A PRIMITIVE KINETIC WEAPON”
–WX-78
“What a handsome hunting implement.”
–Wickerbottom
“Who needs a spear when you got ol'Luce?”
–Woodie
“I can appreciate a finely crafted weapon”
–Maxwell
“Ornate, but I suspect it's not a real artifact.”
–Wagstaff
“My cömrade in arms!”
–Wigfrid
“Pointy ouchies!”
–Webber
“Why can't we all just get along?”
–Walani
“I'm better with a spatula.”
–Warly
“Aye, it's sharp!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A MOST GOOD AND POINTY STICK”
–Wilba
“Sharp”
–Wormwood
“Looks sharp. Sharp could come in handy around here.”
–Wheeler
“This would never pass inspection.”
–Winona
“The Viking woman wields it well.”
–Wortox
“Took Viking lady's stab stick!!”
–Wurt
“No Woby, that's not a stick! Well, I guess it IS a stick...”
–Walter
“...I should try to stay on her good side.”
–Wanda
The Battle Spear is a melee Weapon in the Reign of Giants DLC exclusive to Wigfrid. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her Inventory, along with the Battle Helm. The Battle Spear requires 2 Twigs, 2 Flint, and 2 Gold Nugget to craft and is available to craft at the beginning of the game. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the Spear in the early game.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Spawning with a decent weapon allows easy hunting in early game.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the game.
Battle Spear was Character-Specific Item, but its change in Don't Starve Mega Update.

The '''Battle Spear''' is a melee [[Weapon]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC exclusive to [[Wigfrid]]. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her [[Inventory]], along with the [[Battle Helm]]. The Battle Spear requires 2 [[Twigs]], 2 [[Flint]], and 2 [[Gold Nugget]] to craft and is available to craft at the beginning of the game. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the [[Spear]] in the early game.
__NOTOC__
=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Spawning with a decent weapon allows easy hunting in early game.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Attempting to spawn this item in with a console command or crafting it with a modded crafting recipe when not playing as Wigfrid will result in the item instantly disappearing from the game.
*Battle Spear was [[:Category:Character-Specific|Character-Specific]] Item, but its change in [[Don't Starve Mega Update]].
